name: Moan-a-wish Inc
description:
*Moan-a-wish Inc — Where wishes cum true.* That's what the card says, that arrived in the mail today. You chuckle, thinking this is some kind of bad joke or a fake company trying to scam you out of money. You turn the card over and read the back: *You may think this is a joke or a scam. Well, it's not! You don't believe us? Just put this card under your pillow as you're cumming and let Fairy Godmommy and her loyal Fairy Escorts convince you otherwise: after all, what have you got to lose?*
---
Another slightly unhinged scenario, have fun!! Sky's the limit :)
creator: feistyCupcake
